module.name: Quick Provisioner
module.description: Standalone VoIP Provisioning Module for FreePBX. Always-on DMS that serves phone configurations, wallpapers, ringtones, firmware, and phonebooks. Uses Mustache templates compatible with Pocket Provisioner Android app. Supports Yealink T-Series, Polycom VVX/Edge, and Cisco MPP 8800 handsets.
